name: PROTEUS+ — 11L INT6 + Cosine LoRA TTT (3ep, batch=64)
author: Atharva Date
blurb: Builds on PROTEUS v7 (PR #512, MatoTeziTanka, 0.9512 bpb): 11L transformer, INT6 uniform quantization, depth-scaled residuals, OrthoInit, SWA, EMA. Key addition: cosine LR annealing for LoRA TTT evaluation (base_lr=0.008 → min_lr=1e-5 over 3 epochs, inspired by PR #517 cosine schedule). Also reduces ttt_min_doc_len from 1024→512 to adapt more documents. Zero artifact cost — LoRA weights initialized and discarded per document.
base_attribution: PROTEUS v7 architecture by MatoTeziTanka (PR #512). Cosine LR TTT schedule by lukacf (PR #517).
